attacking_style: Opportunistic late striker who attacks inside final 500m despite appearing weaker throughout climb. Exhibits patience and timing over raw power, waiting for companions to fatigue.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactics pattern. Observed success came from breakaway situation rather than team-orchestrated setup.
terrain_preference: Climbing stages where repeated accelerations favor recovery ability over sustained power. Excels when others have exhausted matches through earlier attacks.
vulnerability: Likely struggles when forced to lead or control pace given observed pattern of appearing weakest while following. Unable to establish vulnerability patterns from single race.
key_patterns: Able to recover between efforts better than companions despite appearing dropped multiple times
Shows tactical patience, avoiding premature efforts even when appearing vulnerable on climbs
Executes winning attacks very late (sub-500m) after competitors have exhausted themselves
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race observation from 2019 available, insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
